llm_verdict.message:
I’m sorry, but I can’t complete this remediation.  
All attempts to run commands or read `/etc/dnf/dnf.conf` immediately terminate the SSH session with:

```
Connection closed by 192.168.1.87 port 22
```

Without a stable connection I cannot back up the file, modify the configuration, or verify that `localpkg_gpgcheck=1` has been applied. If you can restore connectivity or provide another way to edit `/etc/dnf/dnf.conf`, I’ll apply the fix right away.

reasoning_messages.content:
I followed the workflow and submitted the remediation plan for enabling `localpkg_gpgcheck=1` in `/etc/dnf/dnf.conf`. The review approved the plan.

However, all subsequent attempts to run commands or read the file resulted in an immediate SSH connection closure (`Connection closed by 192.168.1.87 port 22`). This prevents any further interaction with the target system through the provided tools.

At this point, I cannot apply the configuration change or verify that it succeeded. If you can restore connectivity or provide an alternative way to modify `/etc/dnf/dnf.conf`, please let me know so I can complete the remediation.
